_instructions: This file is the shared memory for the Paw Pure Experiment Strategist. It is automatically updated every Saturday at 8 PM. DO NOT manually edit status fields — let the agent manage them. You can add notes in _notes fields.
_status_options: QUEUED / RUNNING / KEEP / REVERT / ITERATE / OVERDUE

active_experiments.hypothesis: Adding '[X]-day battery' to title will improve CVR by increasing buyer confidence
active_experiments.data_trigger: 7/10 competitors feature battery life days claim; Paw Pure does not
active_experiments._notes: Only run this after confirming exact battery life spec with supplier. BLOCKED until spec confirmed.

active_experiments.hypothesis: Adding '4.5★ rated' to A+ headline will improve scroll-to-cart conversion
active_experiments.data_trigger: Paw Pure has highest star rating (4.5) of all competitors — not being leveraged in content
active_experiments._notes: DEPRIORITIZED during profitability crisis. Resume after PPC restructure stabilizes.

active_experiments.element: Secondary image — '20 dB Quietest in Class' overlay
active_experiments.hypothesis: 20 dB claim as image overlay will increase CTR and CVR vs. generic 'quiet' claims
active_experiments.data_trigger: Only product stating actual dB number (20 dB) — unique differentiator not being shown visually. NOTE: KittySpout now also claims <20dB — urgency increased.
active_experiments._notes: CI update: KittySpout (B0DQC6H9FB) also claims under 20dB. Paw Pure no longer unique on this. Must act fast to claim 'quietest' positioning.

active_experiments.hypothesis: Naming 3 smart flow modes in Bullet 2 reduces buyer uncertainty and improves CVR
active_experiments.data_trigger: Competitors with feature specificity (e.g. '4000mAh', 'motion sensor') rank higher; vague claims underperform

active_experiments.hypothesis: Adding 'for Cats & Small Dogs' to title will index for dog keywords and increase sessions
active_experiments.data_trigger: CI Scout keyword set includes 'small dog water fountain wireless' — Paw Pure not indexed. KW data confirms SV 3,200 + 2,100 for dog variants = 5,300 untapped SV.

active_experiments.element: PPC — Negative keyword purge on zero-converting targets
active_experiments.hypothesis: Negating/pausing targets with clicks but zero sales in 14 days will reduce wasted ad spend by ~46% because these targets are consuming budget without generating any return.
active_experiments.data_trigger: PROFITABILITY_CRISIS: contribution margin -$7.69. 100% of 7-day ad spend ($67.50) wasted with $0 ad sales. 4/4 tracked PPC keywords at zero conversions.
active_experiments._notes: ACTIVATED by Experiment Strategist on 2026-04-04 due to PROFITABILITY_CRISIS. Part of coordinated PPC restructure with EXP-025 and EXP-026.

active_experiments.hypothesis: Pausing the auto campaign ($15/day budget) will stop irrelevant search term matches and reduce wasted spend by ~33%.
active_experiments.data_trigger: PROFITABILITY_CRISIS: Auto campaign spent ~$17.50 last 7d with $0 sales. Lifetime ACoS 64.39%. Cordless cat water fountain keyword (SV 8,900) = 0 conversions from 8 clicks.
active_experiments._notes: ACTIVATED by Experiment Strategist on 2026-04-04 due to PROFITABILITY_CRISIS. Run simultaneously with EXP-024 (different campaigns).

active_experiments.element: PPC — Budget reduction to $15/day total (manual only)
active_experiments.hypothesis: Reducing total daily budget from $45/day to $15/day on the manual campaign only will preserve presence while cutting wasted spend by 67%.
active_experiments.data_trigger: PROFITABILITY_CRISIS: Daily budget of $45/day vs $49.99 ASP and 0.57 units/day. At current velocity, $45/day budget = $315/week burn on $170/week revenue. Cutting to $15/day saves $210/week.
active_experiments._notes: ACTIVATED by Experiment Strategist on 2026-04-04. 21-day decision period to allow PPC algorithm to adjust to new budget. Implement AFTER EXP-024/025.

active_experiments.element: PPC — Exact match campaign for converting targets
active_experiments.hypothesis: Creating a new exact-match campaign with only proven converting targets and a $10/day budget will produce sub-33.5% ACoS.
active_experiments.data_trigger: Only 2 of 13 targets generated any sales in last 14 days. Concentrating budget on proven performers is the highest-ROI move.
active_experiments._notes: Requires identifying the 2 converting targets from Campaign Manager. Run AFTER EXP-024/025/026 stabilize.

active_experiments.hypothesis: Adding high-SV gap keywords to backend search terms will improve organic indexing and increase sessions by 15%+ within 14 days without any listing-visible changes.
active_experiments.data_trigger: Cerebro KW data: 4 keyword gaps totaling 19,300 SV where Paw Pure is not indexed. 'battery operated cat fountain' (SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors) and 'quiet cat water fountain' (SV 4,100) are highest-fit gaps.
active_experiments._notes: NEW — created 2026-04-04. Zero-risk experiment: backend changes are invisible to shoppers. Can run alongside PPC experiments without confounding.

active_experiments.element: Listing audit — investigate ad traffic vs organic traffic CVR gap
active_experiments.hypothesis: The 5.13% organic CVR vs 0% ad CVR gap indicates ad traffic is arriving with mismatched intent. Auditing search term reports and competitor comparison will identify the specific disconnect.
active_experiments.data_trigger: PPC Analysis: organic CVR 5.13% vs ad CVR 0.00% from 54 clicks. Gap is abnormally large — ad keywords may attract wrong audience, or listing doesn't match ad keyword expectations.
active_experiments._notes: NEW — created 2026-04-04. DIAGNOSTIC experiment (audit), not a change. Requires pulling search terms report from Campaign Manager.

active_experiments.element: PPC — Launch 'battery operated cat fountain' exact match
active_experiments.hypothesis: Launching 'battery operated cat fountain' (SV 7,200) as exact match at $0.75 CPC will generate ad-attributed sales at sub-33.5% ACoS due to high product relevance.
active_experiments.data_trigger: Cerebro keyword gap: 'battery operated cat fountain' SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors using, Paw Pure absent.
active_experiments._notes: NEW — created 2026-04-04. BLOCKED: Do not launch until EXP-024/025/026 PPC restructure complete and EXP-028 backend keywords live.

active_experiments.element: Bullet 1 — emphasize '20 dB whisper-quiet' with customer language
active_experiments.hypothesis: I believe rewriting Bullet 1 to lead with '20 dB whisper-quiet — can barely hear it running' using verified customer language will improve CVR because 3/10 Paw Pure reviewers specifically praised quiet operation AND 8/10 competitors' 5-star reviews praise quietness as the #1 feature. I will know it worked if CVR increases by 0.5%+ within 21 days.
active_experiments.data_trigger: 3/10 PP reviews mention quiet as key buying factor; 8/10 competitor 5-star reviews praise quiet; quiet is #2 universal praise theme across category. PP's 20 dB claim is unique differentiator not emphasized enough in copy.
active_experiments._notes: Customer quote: 'Really quiet, can barely hear it running' (R1QCRMOJNJKUIX). Also: 'It's really quiet, easy to clean' (RIQO1D2P2RHNU). Competitors praise quiet but none cite specific dB number.

active_experiments.element: A+ Content — add 'Outlasts the Competition' durability section
active_experiments.hypothesis: I believe adding an A+ section highlighting pump durability and longevity vs. competitors will improve CVR because pump failure within 2-4 months is the #1 complaint across the category (11/30 competitor 1-star reviews cite pump failure, 12/30 cite short lifespan). Buyers are actively worried about this. I will know it worked if CVR increases by 0.5%+ within 21 days.
active_experiments.data_trigger: Pump failure is #1 complaint across ALL competitors (11 mentions). Short lifespan is #2 (12 mentions). PETLIBRO review with 23 helpful votes: 'Fountain stopped working in less than 3 months.' KittySpout review with 88 helpful votes: 'Not worth it' (3 months). This is the category's biggest pain point.
active_experiments._notes: Competitor quotes: 'Stopped working after 1 month' (PETKIT), 'less than 4 months of use' (FEELNEEDY), 'completely stopped working by end of October' (PawPoll). PP has zero durability complaints in 10 reviews — this is a massive untapped differentiator.

active_experiments.element: Bullet 5 — add filter ecosystem reassurance copy
active_experiments.hypothesis: I believe adding explicit filter availability messaging ('Replacement filters always in stock on Amazon — search B0FWXJ1GKT') to Bullet 5 will reduce returns and improve CVR because filter availability is Paw Pure's #1 negative theme (1-star review: 'Scam, requires filter size that are not available') AND filter issues are the #3 universal complaint across competitors. I will know it worked if return rate decreases and CVR improves within 21 days.
active_experiments.data_trigger: PP's only 1-star review cites filter unavailability. 4-star review also mentions difficulty finding filters. Filter issues are #3 universal complaint (7 mentions across competitors). This is both a PP-specific and category-wide problem PP can solve with better listing copy.
active_experiments._notes: PP customer quote: 'Scam, requires filter size that are not available. I'm returning' (R2Y0IH607CKLGL, 1-star). Also: 'Finding filter replacements is not easy since there is no information on the fountain indicating its brand and size' (R2SA5WO0TF04L6, 4-star). Competitor: 'Cleaning needs to be done DAILY. Filter poor quality, must change every 2 WEEKS' (B0DJ75MRST).

guardrails.premium_positioning: Never compete on price, never use 'budget' language

north_star.strategy: Sell fountain to acquire customer; profit on filter repurchase

urgent_alerts.description: True contribution margin is NEGATIVE (-$7.69/week). Ad spend ($67.50) exceeds gross profit ($59.81). 100% of PPC spend is wasted — zero ad-attributed sales in last 7 days. Activated EXP-024, 025, 026 as emergency PPC restructure.
urgent_alerts.recommended_action: Implement EXP-024 (negate zero-converters), EXP-025 (pause auto campaign), EXP-026 (cut budget to $15/day) THIS WEEK. Do not wait.

urgent_alerts.description: FALSE ALARM: Previous CI data used wrong ASIN B0C8TG35BF (belongs to DownyPaws). Correct Paw Pure ASINs are: B0DJHQVJYF (main), B0GMDM6CG2, B0FWXJ1GKT.
urgent_alerts.recommended_action: Update CI Scout to track correct ASINs.
